system.description:
These devices, also known as sense-links, allow the owner to directly interface with a machine or technological device. MIUs see widespread use among Techmarines.

A basic MIU implant involves a single spinal or cortex connector, while advanced variants include wrist connector probes—and possibly mechadendrite connectors—in addition to the spinal plug.

Game Effects: Gives no modifiers to machine spirit communication. Grants a +10 bonus to Tech-Use, Pilot, or Drive Tests used in conjunction with devices capable of MIU link.

Note: Bonuses only apply when directly interfaced with MIU-capable devices/systems.
